name: Cornmeal Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, salt, sugar, and baking powder.
Stir to blend well.
2. With a pastry blender, cut in shortening until evenly distributed.
3. Add cornmeal and mix well.
4. Transfer the mixture to a large airtight container.
Label as CORNMEAL MIX and store in a cool, dry place.
Use within 12 weeks. Makes about 10 and 1/2 cups of CORNMEAL MIX.
